title: Where Is Luna?
synopsis: Baby Luna plays peek-a-boo with her loving family members throughout the house, hiding behind curtains, blankets, and toys while delighting everyone with her giggles and surprise appearances.

illustration.description: Baby Luna with warm brown skin and curly black hair peeks out from behind bright yellow curtains, her dark eyes sparkling with joy. Her chubby hands grip the soft fabric as she grins widely, showing her first few teeth. The living room background features soft pastels with a cozy sofa and family photos on the walls.
illustration.alt: Baby Luna playing peek-a-boo behind yellow curtains

illustration.description: Luna crouches behind a large stuffed elephant toy, only her tiny feet visible beneath. The elephant is soft gray with pink ears, sitting on a rainbow-colored play mat. Warm afternoon sunlight streams through the window, creating gentle shadows and highlighting the cozy nursery with wooden toys scattered around.
illustration.alt: Luna hiding behind a gray stuffed elephant

illustration.description: Luna's mama, a beautiful woman with long black hair in a colorful headwrap, searches playfully around the room with exaggerated surprise on her face. She wears a flowing purple dress and has her hands on her hips, looking under a small table. The room is filled with warm orange and pink tones.
illustration.alt: Mama searching for Luna in the living room

illustration.description: Luna pops up from behind a soft blue blanket, her arms raised high in triumph and pure delight on her face. Her mama claps her hands in joy, both of them sharing a moment of connection. The blanket is decorated with small white stars, and warm light bathes the scene in golden tones.
illustration.alt: Luna surprising mama by appearing from behind a blanket

illustration.description: Luna crawls under a kitchen table where her papa sits reading, only her diaper-clad bottom visible. Papa has kind brown eyes, short black hair, and wears a green sweater. He pretends not to see her, holding a finger to his smiling lips. The kitchen has warm wood tones and hanging plants.
illustration.alt: Luna hiding under the kitchen table near papa

illustration.description: Papa bends down with an exaggerated confused expression, looking left and right dramatically. His hands are cupped around his eyes like binoculars. The kitchen background shows colorful bowls on shelves and a window with herb plants growing on the sill in terracotta pots.
illustration.alt: Papa searching for Luna with hands around his eyes

illustration.description: Luna emerges from under the table with the biggest smile, her arms stretched wide toward papa who looks delightfully startled with raised eyebrows and an open mouth of surprise. Both are laughing, and the scene radiates warmth and joy with soft morning light filling the cozy kitchen space.
illustration.alt: Luna surprising papa with a big boo and both laughing

illustration.description: The whole family - mama, papa, and baby Luna - sit together on a soft cream-colored rug, all playing peek-a-boo with their hands over their eyes. Luna sits between her parents, all three with huge smiles. The room glows with warm evening light, and colorful toys are scattered nearby creating a perfect family moment.
illustration.alt: The whole family playing peek-a-boo together on the floor

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: Who is playing peek-a-boo?
questions.explanation: Luna is the baby who plays peek-a-boo throughout the story!

questions.question: Where does Luna hide first?
questions.explanation: Luna first hides behind the bright yellow curtains!

questions.question: What sound does Luna make?
questions.explanation: Luna giggles when she plays peek-a-boo!
